visits.chief_complaint: Increased tremor in right hand, difficulty buttoning shirts

assessment.notes: Resting tremor R hand, mild rigidity bilateral upper extremities, gait slightly shuffling

visits.diagnosis_notes: Parkinson's disease, Hoehn & Yahr Stage 2. Motor fluctuations emerging with ~3 hrs OFF time daily.
visits.treatment_plan: Consider adding COMT inhibitor. Follow-up in 8 weeks.

visits.chief_complaint: Motor fluctuations, wearing-off before next dose

assessment.notes: Moderate bradykinesia, wearing-off 45 min before next levodopa dose

visits.diagnosis_notes: PD with emerging motor fluctuations. Cognition stable.
visits.treatment_plan: Added pramipexole last visit showing some benefit. Monitor wearing-off closely.

visits.chief_complaint: Chronic migraines, 12-15 headache days per month despite topiramate

assessment.notes: Bilateral throbbing headaches, photophobia, phonophobia, nausea. Medication overuse suspected (ibuprofen 4-5x/week)

visits.diagnosis_notes: Chronic migraine with medication overuse headache. Consider CGRP monoclonal antibody.
visits.treatment_plan: Start erenumab 70mg monthly SC injection. Taper OTC analgesics. Headache diary.

visits.chief_complaint: Progressive memory loss, getting lost in familiar places

assessment.notes: Significant short-term memory impairment. Difficulty with clock drawing. Disoriented to date. Caregiver reports sundowning.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Alzheimer's disease, moderate stage. MMSE declined from 22 to 17 over 12 months.
visits.treatment_plan: Continue current medications. Caregiver education. Safety assessment for home environment.

assessment.notes: Repeating questions frequently. Misplacing objects. Still able to perform basic ADLs with prompting.

visits.diagnosis_notes: AD progressing from mild to moderate. Added memantine.
visits.treatment_plan: Start memantine 5mg titrating to 10mg BID. Neuropsych testing ordered.

assessment.notes: Witnessed GTC seizure, duration ~90 seconds. Post-ictal confusion ~20 minutes. Missed doses due to travel.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Focal epilepsy with bilateral tonic-clonic seizures. Breakthrough likely due to missed doses.
visits.treatment_plan: Reinforce medication adherence. Consider pill organizer/alarm. Check drug levels. Driving restriction counseling.

visits.chief_complaint: New numbness in left leg, increased fatigue

assessment.notes: Decreased sensation L leg below knee. Hyperreflexia bilateral lower extremities. EDSS 3.5. Fatigue Severity Scale 52/63.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Relapsing-remitting MS. Possible new relapse with L leg sensory symptoms. MRI ordered.
visits.treatment_plan: Urgent MRI brain and spine. If new lesions, consider IV methylprednisolone 1g x 3-5 days.

visits.chief_complaint: Follow-up 3 months post right MCA ischemic stroke

assessment.notes: Left hemiparesis improved but persistent. Grip strength L hand 3/5. Gait with hemiplegic pattern. Mild neglect on cancellation testing.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Post-stroke recovery. Mild cognitive impairment. BP still above target. Dual antiplatelet completed.
visits.treatment_plan: Continue rehab (PT/OT/speech). Increase lisinopril to 40mg. Repeat cognitive assessment in 3 months.

visits.chief_complaint: Burning pain and tingling in both feet, worsening over 6 months

assessment.notes: Decreased pinprick and vibration sense bilateral feet to mid-shin. Absent ankle reflexes. Stocking pattern sensory loss. HbA1c 8.2%.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Diabetic peripheral neuropathy, length-dependent. Suboptimal glycemic control contributing to progression.
visits.treatment_plan: Increase gabapentin to 600mg TID. Refer to endocrinology for diabetes optimization. EMG/NCS ordered. Foot care education.

visits.chief_complaint: Planning pregnancy, need medication adjustment for epilepsy

assessment.notes: Seizure-free 18 months. No focal deficits. Normal neurological exam. Currently on valproate which is teratogenic.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Generalized epilepsy, well-controlled on valproate. Pre-conception counseling needed - valproate contraindicated in pregnancy.
visits.treatment_plan: Cross-titrate from valproate to lamotrigine over 8-12 weeks. Increase folic acid to 4mg daily. EEG after transition. Defer conception until stable on new regimen.

visits.chief_complaint: Visual hallucinations, acting out dreams at night

assessment.notes: Vivid visual hallucinations (people in room). REM sleep behavior disorder confirmed by bed partner. Orthostatic hypotension (drop 25mmHg on standing). Moderate bilateral rigidity.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Advanced PD with psychosis and autonomic dysfunction. Consider PD dementia vs DLB overlap. RBD management ongoing.
visits.treatment_plan: Start pimavanserin 34mg daily for hallucinations. Fludrocortisone 0.1mg for orthostatic hypotension. Neuropsych evaluation. Avoid anticholinergics.

visits.chief_complaint: Newly diagnosed MS after optic neuritis episode

assessment.notes: Resolved optic neuritis R eye (visual acuity 20/25, was 20/80). MRI shows 8 T2 lesions periventricular, 2 enhancing. OCBs positive in CSF. EDSS 1.5.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Newly diagnosed RRMS (McDonald 2017 criteria). High lesion load suggests aggressive disease.
visits.treatment_plan: Start dimethyl fumarate 120mg BID x 7 days then 240mg BID. Baseline labs (CBC, LFTs, JCV antibody). Vitamin D 2000 IU daily. MS education and support referral.

assessment.notes: Severe cognitive impairment. Unable to recall any of 3 words. Cannot identify date, season, or location. Agitated during exam. Caregiver reports exit-seeking behavior, sleep disruption.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Advanced Alzheimer's disease. Behavioral symptoms requiring pharmacological management. Caregiver burnout identified.
visits.treatment_plan: May increase quetiapine to 50mg if agitation persists. Refer caregiver to support group. Home safety evaluation. Discuss goals of care and advance directives.

visits.chief_complaint: Migraine with aura, new onset tingling in right hand during attacks

assessment.notes: Reports scintillating scotoma lasting 20 min followed by right-hand tingling 10 min then headache. 6-8 attacks per month. No focal deficits on exam.

visits.diagnosis_notes: Migraine with typical visual and sensory aura. High frequency warrants preventive optimization. Rule out secondary causes given new sensory aura.
visits.treatment_plan: MRI brain with and without contrast to exclude structural lesion. Add CGRP antagonist (fremanezumab 225mg monthly SC). Avoid combined OCP given migraine with aura. Headache diary.
